cards.name: Leonardo, the Balance
cards.text:
Whenever a token you control enters, you may put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Do this only once each turn.
{W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Creatures you control gain menace, trample, and lifelink until end of turn.
Partner-Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

cards.flavor: "I always thought there'd be more to the ooze."
cards.name: Donatello, the Brains
cards.text:
If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus a Mutagen token are created instead.
Partner-Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

cards.flavor: "We choose what holds us back."
cards.name: Splinter, the Mentor
cards.text:
Menace
Whenever Splinter or another nontoken creature you control leaves the battlefield, create a Mutagen token.
Partner-Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

cards.name: Raphael, the Muscle
cards.text:
Double all damage that creatures you control with counters on them would deal.
When Raphael enters, create a Mutagen token.
Partner-Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

cards.name: Michelangelo, the Heart
cards.text:
Trample
Raid (the Fridge) - At the beginning of your second main phase, if you attacked this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and create a Food token.
Partner-Character select (You can have two commanders if both have this ability.)

cards.flavor: They're the world's most fearsome fighting team!
cards.name: Heroes in a Half Shell
cards.text:
Vigilance, menace, trample, haste
Whenever one or more Mutants, Ninjas, and/or Turtles you control deal combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each of those creatures and draw a card.

cards.flavor: "You've gotta give it your all because anything less won't get the job done."
cards.name: Continue?
cards.text: Choose up to four target creature cards in your graveyard that were put there from the battlefield this turn. Return them to the battlefield.

cards.name: Endless Foot Assault
cards.text:
Squad {1}{W} (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may pay {1}{W} any number of times. When this enchantment enters, create that many tokens that are copies of it.)
Whenever you attack, for each opponent, create a 1/1 black Ninja creature token that's tapped and attacking that player.

cards.flavor: "This is great! I must really be onto something hot if they're trying to kill me!"
cards.name: April O'Neil, Live on the Scene
cards.text:
Whenever a Mutant, Ninja, or Turtle you control enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
Partner-Character select

cards.flavor: "What am I? I am nothing anymore! A FREAK! I'll never be taken seriously as a scientist again!"
cards.name: Baxter, Fly in the Ointment
cards.text:
Whenever Baxter enters or attacks, each creature you control with a counter on it gains flying until end of turn.
Whenever you draw a card, put a +1/+1 counter on Baxter.

cards.flavor: "Give me a recap. Are we winning or losing?"
cards.name: Here Comes a New Hero!
cards.text: Target player draws X cards. Create a token that's a copy of up to one target creature with mana value X or less.

cards.flavor: "I'm not trying to cause trouble. Trouble just follows me around."
cards.name: Irma, Part-Time Mutant
cards.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, Irma becomes a copy of up to one other target creature you control, except her name is Irma, Part-Time Mutant and she has this ability. Then put a +1/+1 counter on her.

cards.flavor: "I am Krang, the All-Powerful! I have never been defeated!"
cards.name: Krang, the All-Powerful
cards.text:
If a player drawing a card causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
Whenever a player draws their second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Krang.

cards.name: Ray Fillet, Wave Warrior
cards.text:
Flying
Evolve (Whenever a creature you control enters, if that creature has greater power or toughness than this creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.)
Whenever a creature you control with a counter on it deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

cards.name: Bebop, Skull & Crossbones
cards.text:
Partner with Rocksteady, Mutant Marauder (When this creature enters, target player may put Rocksteady into their hand from their library, then shuffle.)
Deathtouch
Whenever Bebop deals combat damage to a player, you may draw X cards, where X is the number of counters on Bebop. If you do, you lose X life.

cards.name: Dimension X Pizzasaur
cards.text:
When this creature enters, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. When you do, destroy up to one target creature with mana value less than or equal to the number of counters among permanents you control.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life and each opponent loses 3 life.

cards.name: Foot Chopper
cards.text:
When this Equipment enters, create a 1/1 black Ninja creature token, then attach this Equipment to it.
Equipped creature has flying.
Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it. If you do, draw cards equal to its power.
Equip {2}

cards.flavor:
"I've beaten this turtle already. This is no test."
-Karai
cards.name: Game Over
cards.text:
This spell costs {2} less to cast if a player's life total is less than or equal to half their starting life total.
Destroy all creatures.

cards.flavor: "Every chessboard requires pawns. Tonight, my pawn, I'll find out just how strong you are."
cards.name: Rat King, Pale Piper
cards.text:
Menace
Whenever Rat King or another nontoken creature you control leaves the battlefield, create a 1/1 black Rat creature token.
{2}, Sacrifice a token: Draw a card.

cards.name: Shredder, Shadow Master
cards.text:
Whenever Shredder attacks a player, for each other opponent, create a token that's a copy of Shredder tapped and attacking that player, except it isn't legendary. Sacrifice those tokens at end of combat.
Whenever Shredder deals combat damage to a player, that player loses half their life, rounded up.

cards.flavor: "My patience wears thin!"
cards.name: Swift Demise
cards.text: Swift Demise deals 1 damage to target creature. Then destroy each creature you don't control that was dealt damage this turn.

cards.name: Casey Jones, Back Alley Brute
cards.text:
Menace
Whenever Casey Jones attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature.
Whenever you put one or more +1/+1 counters on a creature you control, Casey Jones deals that much damage to target opponent.

cards.name: Electric Seaweed
cards.text:
Defender, haste
When this creature enters, until end of turn, whenever another creature dies, this creature deals 1 damage to each non-Wall creature.
{T}: This creature deals 1 damage to any target.

cards.flavor: The streets are a dangerous place for a pair of neon nightriders.
cards.name: Fast Forward
cards.text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each opponent you attacked this turn.
Goad all creatures your opponents control. (Until your next turn, those creatures attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.)

cards.name: Shellshock
cards.text: For each opponent, choose up to one target creature that player controls. Shellshock deals X damage to each of those creatures. You create a Mutagen token for each creature dealt damage this way. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

cards.name: Special Move
cards.text:
Choose two -
• Jump Kick - Destroy target artifact.
• Dash Attack - Put two +1/+1 counters on target attacking or blocking creature you control.
• Foot Toss - Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to any other target. Then sacrifice it.

cards.flavor: "The stakes have risen, my green friends. Now you are playing for the fate of the world!"
cards.name: Tempestra, Dame of Games
cards.text: {2}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Create a token that's a copy of another target creature you control, except it isn't legendary. It gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

cards.flavor:
"They're not stupid. They're infants."
-Professor Jordan Perry
cards.name: Tokka & Rahzar, Unsupervised
cards.text:
First strike
Whenever another nontoken creature you control leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Tokka & Rahzar and create a Treasure token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

cards.flavor: Victory comes in endless forms.
cards.name: High Score
cards.text:
If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.
At the beginning of your end step, draw a card if you control a creature with the greatest power among creatures on the battlefield.

cards.flavor: She's a thousand pounds of punishing reptile muscle, with the bite to back it up.
cards.name: Leatherhead, Iron Gator
cards.text:
Trample, haste
Whenever Leatherhead attacks, put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control.

cards.name: Level Up
cards.text:
Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, put a +1/+1 counter on enchanted creature.
Enchanted creature has "Whenever this creature attacks, double the number of +1/+1 counters on it. Then if it has power 10 or greater, draw a card."

cards.flavor: The pizza that vanishes quickly without a trace.
cards.name: Ninja Pizza
cards.text:
Foods you control have "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color."
At the beginning of your second main phase, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

cards.name: Rocksteady, Mutant Marauder
cards.text:
Partner with Bebop, Skull & Crossbones (When this creature enters, target player may put Bebop into their hand from their library, then shuffle.)
Trample
Whenever another nontoken creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

cards.flavor: "Just gotta hit 'em harder than they hit you!"
cards.name: Super Combo
cards.text:
Replicate {2} (When you cast this spell, copy it for each time you paid its replicate cost. You may choose new targets for the copies.)
Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

cards.name: Double Jump
cards.text:
Put a flying counter on target creature you control. Until end of turn, it has base power and toughness 5/5.
Fuse (You may cast one or both halves of this card from your hand.)

cards.name: Flying Kick
cards.text:
Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.
Fuse (You may cast one or both halves of this card from your hand.)

cards.flavor: From the golden age of gaming . . .
cards.name: Arcade Cabinet
cards.text:
When this artifact enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to four target creatures.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice a token: Double the number of counters on target creature.

cards.name: Big Mother Mouser
cards.text:
This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it.
Whenever this creature attacks, double the number of +1/+1 counters on it.
When this creature dies, create a number of 1/1 colorless Robot artifact creature tokens equal to the number of +1/+1 counters on this creature.

cards.flavor: Nowhere else can one coin buy you a second chance.
cards.name: Coin of Mastery
cards.text:
Each creature you control enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it for each mana from an artifact source spent to cast it.
{T}: Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

cards.flavor:
"Good news, dudes! It says it's inflammable!"
-Michelangelo
cards.name: Exploding Barrel
cards.text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Put a pressure counter on this artifact.
{8}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: It deals 20 damage to target creature. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each pressure counter on this artifact. Activate only as sorcery.

cards.name: Mole Module
cards.text:
Menace
Whenever this Vehicle deals combat damage to a player, mill four cards. You may put a permanent card from among them onto the battlefield.
Crew 2

cards.name: Roadkill Rodney
cards.text:
Squad {3} (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may pay {3} any number of times. When this creature enters, create that many tokens that are copies of it.)
Deathtouch
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Mutagen token.

cards.flavor:
"All the best comic books start in dark alleys."
-Michelangelo
cards.name: Big Apple, 3 a.m.
cards.text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color.
{T}: Add one mana of the chosen color.
{5}, {T}: Create a 1/1 black Rat creature token for each opponent you have.

cards.flavor: Between ninjas, mutants, and alien bases, the subterranean housing market is shockingly competitive.
cards.name: Hidden Hideout
cards.text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
{2}, {T}: Target creature you control with a counter on it gains lifelink until end of turn.

cards.flavor: One lean, mean, green, incredible team.
cards.name: Together Forever
cards.text:
When this enchantment enters, support 2. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.)
{1}: Choose target creature with a counter on it. When that creature dies this turn, return that card to its owner's hand.

cards.flavor:
"Ninja master, meet derby queen!"
-April O'Neil
cards.name: Vanquish the Horde
cards.text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield.
Destroy all creatures.

cards.flavor:
"Thanks to its increased density, water flowing at just seven miles per hour carries the same kinetic energy as an F5 tornado . . . which is to say: Hold on tight, guys!"
-Donatello
cards.name: Wave Goodbye
cards.text: Return each creature without a +1/+1 counter on it to its owner's hand.

cards.flavor: It was a blunt metaphor: No legacies. No past. From here, the Turtles must choose to live in the present. Or not at all.
cards.name: Blasphemous Act
cards.text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield.
Blasphemous Act deals 13 damage to each creature.

cards.flavor:
"He's more mutagen than mutant!"
-Donatello
cards.name: Acidic Slime
cards.text:
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
When this creature enters, destroy target artifact, enchantment, or land.

cards.name: Biogenic Ooze
cards.text:
When this creature enters, create a 2/2 green Ooze creature token.
At the beginning of your end step, put a +1/+1 counter on each Ooze you control.
{1}{G}{G}{G}: Create a 2/2 green Ooze creature token.

cards.flavor:
"One need not always find peace on the sword's edge, my son. One can find peace as readily in helping things grow."
-Splinter
cards.name: Cultivate
cards.text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.

cards.flavor: "Yo! It's the green machine! / Gonna rock the town without bein' seen! / Have you ever seen a turtle get doooown?"
cards.name: Harmonize
cards.text: Draw three cards.

cards.flavor: "Slash was too perfect a weapon for the Null Group to let him rest in peace . . . Even if the knockoffs proved temperamental."
cards.name: Steelbane Hydra
cards.text:
This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.
{2}{G}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

cards.name: Vigor
cards.text:
Trample
If damage would be dealt to another creature you control, prevent that damage. Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature for each 1 damage prevented this way.
When Vigor is put into a graveyard from anywhere, shuffle it into its owner's library.

cards.name: Voracious Hydra
cards.text:
Trample
This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.
When this creature enters, choose one -
• Double the number of +1/+1 counters on this creature.
• This creature fights target creature you don't control.

cards.flavor: "Who are these . . . freaks? How do they know to fight like that? Answer me, or hang here until you die."
cards.name: Assassin's Trophy
cards.text: Destroy target permanent an opponent controls. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

cards.flavor: "Fear. Feed. Stronger. Spread my spawn."
cards.name: Corpsejack Menace
cards.text: If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, twice that many +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

cards.flavor: The power to draw on the wisdom of your allies at any time, from any place . . . or trade cat pics!
cards.name: Arcane Signet
cards.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

cards.flavor: The Time Scepter can not only control time, but bend reality itself. Its master could rule all of reality, rewriting history to suit their whims.
cards.name: Chromatic Lantern
cards.text:
Lands you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
{T}: Add one mana of any color.

cards.flavor: Antonio's accommodated every request, asked no questions, and stayed open late. Truly a light in the darkness.
cards.name: Sol Ring
cards.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.

cards.flavor: Many interstellar civilizations have dumped their unwanted elements on Planet Morbus, from toxins to lowlifes.
cards.name: Ash Barrens
cards.text:
{T}: Add {C}.
Basic landcycling {1} ({1}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

cards.flavor: Bury my shell on the lone prairie . . .
cards.name: Cinder Glade
cards.text:
({T}: Add {R} or {G}.)
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

cards.flavor: It's like the future's a party that these brothers just crashed . . .
cards.name: City of Brass
cards.text:
Whenever this land becomes tapped, it deals 1 damage to you.
{T}: Add one mana of any color.

cards.flavor: Back in the '80s, Channel 6 built their headquarters at the corner of Spectacle and Scandal.
cards.name: Command Tower
cards.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

cards.flavor: What began with a deafening roar ends in uncertain silence . . .
cards.name: Dragonskull Summit
cards.text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Swamp or a Mountain.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.

cards.flavor:
"A hamster sumo wrestler? Snot that's also a crime lord? An alien newt assassin? April, how am I supposed to edit all of this footage into something watchable, much less believable?"
-Irma Langenstein
cards.name: Evolving Wilds
cards.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

cards.flavor:
"Yooo, Rock, check that out. A mutant music club?"
-Bebop
cards.name: Exotic Orchard
cards.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.

cards.name: Fabled Passage
cards.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control four or more lands, untap that land.

cards.flavor:
"You have traveled from the multitude of diverse universes, and I bid you welcome to the Battle Nexus Tournament."
-Daimyo
cards.name: Grand Coliseum
cards.text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. This land deals 1 damage to you.

cards.flavor: The 79th dimension of Null-Time-the one the Time Masters call home-is the most stable. Ironically, it is lost to time whether they settled there because of that stability or if they made it so.
cards.name: Hinterland Harbor
cards.text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Forest or an Island.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.

cards.name: Path of Ancestry
cards.text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

cards.flavor:
"This doesn't report weather. It makes weather! It's Krang's own design. Fair with high clouds . . . mild showers . . . Aha, TOTAL CHAOS!"
-General Traag
cards.name: Rain-Slicked Copse
cards.text:
({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
This land enters tapped.
Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

cards.flavor: Cruel fate shattered their homeworld into asteroids, with only traces of life preserved beneath emergency shelters. The Triceraton Republic fully intends to make that everyone else's problem . . .
cards.name: Rootbound Crag
cards.text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain or a Forest.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.

cards.flavor: Using their stolen Time Scepter-with total command of time and space-Bebop and Rocksteady departed for Prehistoric Earth in search of "somethin' big ta wrassle."
cards.name: Smoldering Marsh
cards.text:
({T}: Add {B} or {R}.)
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

cards.flavor:
"Dis river, she dangerous. Not clean and safe like your sewers back home, ya?"
-Leatherhead
cards.name: Sodden Verdure
cards.text:
({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

cards.flavor: The strange nature of Dimension X allows any and every microhabitat to flourish, from planet-sized eyes to an asteroid-top jungle paradise.
cards.name: Spire Garden
cards.text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.

cards.flavor:
"The Caribbean in 1530? Rad! Pirates are totally cold! Is that what you say in your time? Or tepid? Cool? Anyway, the Time Scepter says Bebop and Rocksteady should be here somewhere."
-Renet
cards.name: Sunken Hollow
cards.text:
({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

cards.flavor:
"Lookit 'em, Rock. So quiet and content. Dey don't even know they're in a box fer other people ta gawk at. What a buncha dopes."
-Bebop
cards.name: Thriving Grove
cards.text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than green.
{T}: Add {G} or one mana of the chosen color.

cards.flavor:
"My preservation was a spectacle. Artificial empathy to salve the crushing despair of modern human society. Fool's compassion."
-Ray Fillet
cards.name: Thriving Isle
cards.text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than blue.
{T}: Add {U} or one mana of the chosen color.

cards.flavor:
"Not remember good, papa, but . . . miss home. Miss friend."
-Tokka
cards.name: Thriving Moor
cards.text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than black.
{T}: Add {B} or one mana of the chosen color.

cards.flavor: "Welcome, wrestling fans, to Stump Asteroid: Home of Stump Arena and the Intergalactic Wrestling Federation! Tonight we welcome new tag-team challengers! They're lean! They're mean! They're green . . ."
cards.name: Undergrowth Stadium
cards.text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.

cards.flavor:
"You are here because the outside world rejects you. The Foot is your family. I am your father."
-Shredder

cards.text:
({T}: Add {B} or {G}.)

cards.name: Hamato Ninpō
cards.text: Hamato Ninpō deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.

cards.flavor: "Push yourself beyond your limits, to a place where there are no limits!"
cards.name: Leonardo, Worldly Warrior
cards.text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control.
Double strike (This creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)

cards.flavor: Leonardo may have been a goody two-toes and the butt of every joke, but he was also the one they turned to when it was time to put the jokes away.
cards.name: Leo's Guidance
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to three target creatures. Untap them.

cards.name: Splinter & Leo, Father & Son
cards.text:
When Splinter & Leo enter, choose one or both. Each mode must target a different player.
• Target player creates a 2/2 red Mutant creature token.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature target player controls.
cards.type: Legendary Creature - Mutant Ninja Rat Turtle

cards.flavor: Once every decade, Splinter returns to the Battle Nexus. He fights not for glory, but to honor an old friend.
cards.name: Splinter, Aging Champion
cards.text:
When Splinter enters, destroy up to one target tapped creature.
When Splinter leaves the battlefield, you and another target player each draw a card.

cards.flavor:
"I am meant to be the Triceraton Regenta, so I must fulfill my destiny and avenge my mother's death!"
-Seri
cards.name: Triceraton Regenta
cards.text:
Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
Whenever this creature attacks, untap up to one other target creature.

cards.flavor: "A tool need not be complex to be efficient."
cards.name: Wooden Cane
cards.text:
When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 red Mutant creature token, then attach this Equipment to it.
Equipped creature gets +2/+1.
Equip {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

cards.flavor: "If you steal mutagen that doesn't exist from aliens that also don't exist, it's not really theft. More like creative writing!"
cards.name: April O'Neil, Human Element
cards.text: Whenever a player casts an artifact, instant, or sorcery spell, you create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

cards.flavor: "What else can we do? No prison could hold Tokka, and she'll hurt someone if we let her out to play."
cards.name: Containment Protocol
cards.text:
Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature.
Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.

cards.name: Donatello, Rad Scientist
cards.text:
Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
When Donatello enters, tap up to three target creatures your opponents control. Put a stun counter on each of them. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

cards.flavor: Now it is the shell who does the shocking.
cards.name: Donatello's Science Lesson
cards.text: Tap up to two target creatures. Up to two target players each draw a card.

cards.name: Donnie & April, Adorkable Duo
cards.text:
When Donnie & April enter, choose one or both. Each mode must target a different player.
• Target player draws two cards.
• Target player returns an artifact, instant, or sorcery card from their graveyard to their hand.
cards.type: Legendary Creature - Mutant Ninja Human Turtle

cards.flavor: The utrom are a peace-minded people, up to a point. Beyond that, they are a laser-minded people.
cards.name: Utrom Monitor
cards.text:
Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)
Flying (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)

cards.name: Casey & Raph, Hotheads
cards.text:
When Casey & Raph enter, choose one or both. Each mode must target a different player.
• Target player exiles the top card of their library. Until that player's next end step, they may play that card without paying its mana cost.
• Target player creates two Treasure tokens.
cards.type: Legendary Creature - Mutant Ninja Human Turtle

cards.flavor: "Two minutes for slashing, two minutes for hooking, and my personal favorite, two minutes for high-sticking."
cards.name: Casey Jones, Asphalt Hooligan
cards.text:
Double strike (This creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)
{4}: Double Casey Jones's power until end of turn. Any player may activate this ability.

cards.flavor:
"Yes! It knows how to destroy! My secret concern is, does it know how to obey?"
-Krang
cards.name: Monster Mashup
cards.text:
Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)

cards.flavor: "How about a five-minute game misconduct for roughing, pal?"
cards.name: Raphael, Tag Team Tough
cards.text:
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Whenever Raphael deals combat damage to a player for the first time each turn, untap all attacking creatures. After this combat phase, there is an additional combat phase.

cards.flavor: "Why does everyone have such a hard time believing I'm a good guy?"
cards.name: Raph's Bravado
cards.text: During your turn, attacking creatures get +1/+0.

cards.flavor: Raphael loves this stuff. There's a flash as his shuriken come out. The toughs don't even see that. Too bad.
cards.name: Storm of Steel
cards.text: Storm of Steel deals 2 damage to each of one or two targets.

cards.flavor:
"I can take it!"
-Raphael
cards.name: Ticked Off
cards.text: Target creature gains double strike until end of turn. (It deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)

cards.flavor:
"Wilcox said a weed is but an unloved flower, but this is the kind of flower only his mother could love!"
-Donatello
cards.name: Foe-liage
cards.text: Whenever a land enters during your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

cards.name: Michelangelo, On the Scene
cards.text:
Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player it's attacking.)
Michelangelo enters with a +1/+1 counter on him for each land you control.
When Michelangelo dies, return this card to your hand.

cards.name: Mikey & Mona, Mutant Sitters
cards.text:
When Mikey & Mona enter, choose one or both. Each mode must target a different player.
• Target player chooses a creature they control and puts two +1/+1 counters on it.
• Target player returns a creature or land card from their graveyard to their hand.
cards.type: Legendary Creature - Mutant Ninja Turtle Lizard

cards.flavor: "Being surrounded by a little chaos is normally my little happy place, but . . ."
cards.name: Mona Lisa, Ever Adaptable
cards.text: Whenever a player casts a creature spell, you create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

cards.flavor:
"Dinobunga!"
-Michelangelo
cards.name: Prehistoric Turtlesaurus
cards.text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a creature with a +1/+1 counter on it.
Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)

cards.flavor:
"Well, this is like meditating . . ."
-Michelangelo
cards.name: Study the Classics
cards.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature, then double the number of +1/+1 counters on it. You gain life equal to the number of +1/+1 counters on that creature.

cards.flavor: A good view isn't about location. It's about perspective.
cards.name: Turtle Tracks
cards.text: Any number of target players may each search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield under their control, then shuffle.

cards.name: Manhole Cover
cards.text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
When this artifact enters, target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target player draws a card.

cards.flavor:
"Esposito, my liege, grant me the flavor I am due."
-Splinter, the Nibblemancer
cards.name: Dark Ritual
cards.text: Add {B}{B}{B}.

cards.flavor: Devoured by the turtle community.
cards.name: Waste Not
cards.text:
Whenever an opponent discards a creature card, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.
Whenever an opponent discards a land card, add {B}{B}.
Whenever an opponent discards a noncreature, nonland card, draw a card.

cards.flavor: Every pizza is some teenager's prey.
cards.name: Food Chain
cards.text: Exile a creature you control: Add X mana of any one color, where X is 1 plus the exiled creature's mana value. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells.

cards.flavor: Raphael had no second thoughts about the supreme edict. He'd left text messages warning of the concoction, even though there was no service.
cards.name: Supreme Verdict
cards.text:
This spell can't be countered.
Destroy all creatures.

cards.flavor: Not all edible things are fragile.
cards.name: Commander's Plate
cards.text:
Equipped creature gets +3/+3 and has protection from each color that's not in your commander's color identity.
Equip commander {3}
Equip {5}

cards.name: Sword of Hearth and Home
cards.text:
Equipped creature gets +2/+2 and has protection from green and from white.
Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, exile up to one target creature you own, then search your library for a basic land card. Put both cards onto the battlefield under your control, then shuffle.
Equip {2}
